evidence.evidence_text: Engineering characteristics of the compressed-stabilized earth brick Agus Setyo Muntohar ⇑ Department of Civil Engineering, Universitas Muhammadiyah Yogyakarta, Jl. Lingkar Selatan, Taman Tirto, Yogyakarta 55183, Indonesia article info Article history: Received 13 February 2011 Received in revised form 7 March 2011 Accepted 22 April 2011 Available online 23 May 2011 Keywords: Soil stabilization Brick Lime Rice husk ash Compressive strength Flexural strength abstract Utilization of lime and rice husk ash for soil stabilization produced considerable strength gain and other geotechnical properties of the stabilized soils.
